title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: 1. Check: Claude CLI login state ```bash cd /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator claude auth status | jq -e '.loggedIn == true and .authMethod != "none"' ``` Expected success signal: command exits `0`. 2. Check: direct Claude model call returns valid JSON payload ```bash claude --print --output-format json --model claude-sonnet-4-6 \ 'Return ONLY {"risk":"LOW","approve":true,"findings":[],"recommendation":"ok","rationale":"ok"}.' \ > /tmp/claude-direct-probe.json jq -e '.result | fromjson | .risk=="LOW" and .approve==true and (.findings|type=="array")' /tmp/claude-direct-probe.json ``` Expected success signal: both commands exit `0`. 3. Check: local subscription runner recovers `claude-general-reviewer` lane ```bash work="$(mktemp -d /tmp/claude-lane-general.XXXXXX)" ( cd "$work" PROVIDER=claude MODEL="" AGENT_NAME=claude-general-reviewer AGENT_ROLE=general-reviewer \ ISSUE_TITLE='claude lane probe' ISSUE_BODY='return json' \ STRICT_OPUS_ASSIST_DIRECT=false \ bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh jq -e '.skipped==false and .http_code=="cli:0" and .execution_route=="claude-cli" and .provider=="claude"' \ agent-claude-general-reviewer.json jq -e '.model_attempts | contains("claude:claude-sonnet-4-6:exit0") and contains("claude:claude-sonnet-4-6:ok")' \ agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ) ``` Expected success signal: subshell exits `0`; JSON checks pass. 4. Check: strict direct guard still passes for `claude-opus-assist` ```bash work="$(mktemp -d /tmp/claude-lane-opus.XXXXXX)" ( cd "$work" PROVIDER=claude MODEL="" AGENT_NAME=claude-opus-assist AGENT_ROLE=orchestration-assistant \ ISSUE_TITLE='claude opus strict probe' ISSUE_BODY='return json' \ STRICT_OPUS_ASSIST_DIRECT=true \ bash /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh jq -e '.skipped==false and .http_code=="cli:0" and .execution_route=="claude-cli" and .name=="claude-opus-assist"' \ agent-claude-opus-assist.json ) ``` Expected success signal: subshell exits `0`; no strict-guard violation (`exit 43`) and JSON check passes.
